Now, in exercise of the powers conferred by section 7 of the National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of 1956), read with Rule 3 of the National Highways Fee (Determination of Rates and Collection) Rules 2008 and amended from time to time, the Central Government hereby makes the following amendments in the notification published vide S.O. 2836 (E) dated 19.12.2011. (a) For the words and figures in Para 2 of the notification:вҖ” In place of existing Shall be substituted as kilometre 90.000 to kilometre 155.000 (except from km 97.150 to km 98.000) of NH-25 kilometre 90.300 to kilometre 157.850 (except from km 97.150 to km 98.000) of NH-25 Net road section length 36.657 km Net road section length 36.357 km -- 2 of 3 -- В№Hkkx IIОј[k.M 3(ii)Вә Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 3 (b) For the table in Para-1 of Notes, the following table shall be substituted:- Location of Toll Plaza (chainage) Length (in km) for which fee is payable Km 140.40 (near Semari village in Jhansi district) 36.357 (c) For the table in Para-2 of Notes, the following table shall be substituted: Location of Toll Plaza (chainage) Length for which fee is payable (km) Name of bypass Km 140.400 (near Semri village in Jhansi district) 14.636 (excluding length of structure >60m) Jhansi 6.425 Chirgaon 2.193 Semri 6.700 Moth Total 29.954 (d) After Para-2 of Notes, the following Para shall be inserted, namely:- вҖң 2(A) In addition to above, the following fee shall also be due and payable for the use of the following structures having length more than 60 m at the following toll plaza(s), by converting the length of structures into an equivalent length of highway by multiplying the length of such structures by an equalization factor of 10: Location of Toll Plaza (chainage) Length of structures (in km) to be converted into equivalent road length Equivalent road length (in km) Rate at which fee is payable Km 140.40 (near Semari village in Jhansi district) 0.389* 3.890 100% of the base rates mentioned in Table-1 above * The details of structures (> 60 m length) are as under: S.No. Chainage (km) Type of structure Total length (metre) (i) 92+230 Major Bridge 120.000 m (ii) 96+320 ROB 149.105 m (iii) 101+458 ROB 119.500 m Total length of structure 388.605 m (say 389.00 m) вҖқ [F. No. NHAI/ 13013/CO/602/2010-11/ GC- Jhansi (Jhansi-Poonch)] LEENA NANDAN Jt. Secy.
